disambiguated.context: Two long-term friends just had a falling out, a person on the autism spectrum and a sister of mine. I went to talk to each of them about it. The person on the autism spectrum wasn't willing to talk about it at all and just wanted me to leave, while the sister of mine mentioned being really sad because they liked having such a close connection with someone.
disambiguated.question: Who was emotionally withdrawn?

options.C: The person on the autism spectrum
